race.description: Gunnedah Bulk Freighters CB Showcase Mdn Hcp
race.comment: SUTTON STORM (1) overcame a slow start to rally late and be beaten just 1.6 lengths on debut last time out over 1000m at Dubbo. Far better placed out to this trip. Awkwardly drawn with a 4kg claimer aboard but with some natural improvement he is a serious contender. ARTIE'S MAGIC (6) raced wide without cover and found nothing in the run home last start over 1312m at Taree. Draws a better gate today and can bounce back to form without surprising. ALL TOO SHEIK (5) did his best work late to finish runner-up when second-up from a spell over 1200m at Quirindi recently. Going well this prep and another top three finish is on the cards. NORTHERN EAGLE (10) did a fair job when resuming at Tamworth last time and will appreciate a bit more ground.
